fields.label: Max Requests per Minute
fields.description: Maximum WooCommerce API requests per minute across all stores.

fields.label: Queue Batch Size
fields.description: How many sync queue items to process per scheduled run. Lower this if your server is slow.

fields.label: Retry Attempts
fields.description: How many times to retry a failed sync before marking it permanently failed and sending an alert.

fields.label: Verify Webhook Signature
fields.description: Reject incoming WooCommerce webhooks that fail HMAC-SHA256 signature verification. Strongly recommended.

fields.label: Allowed Webhook IPs
fields.description: Optional: restrict webhooks to these IP addresses or CIDR ranges (one per line). Leave blank to allow all IPs.

fields.label: Enable Debug Logging
fields.description: Log detailed sync activity. Useful for troubleshooting. Disable in production to save disk space.

fields.label: Alert Email
fields.description: Email address to notify when sync failures occur or connection goes down. Leave blank to disable alerts.

fields.label: Log Retention (Days)
fields.description: Delete sync queue records older than this many days. Keeps your database from growing too large.
